error_signature: The resource you are requesting could not be found
title: Google Docs update fails due to missing resource
symptom: When attempting to update a document in Google Docs, n8n throws 'The resource you are requesting could not be found'. This occurs when the document ID or URL provided is incorrect or not accessible.
not_this_if: The document ID or URL is correct and accessible
root_cause: This error typically occurs when the document ID or URL provided to the 'Update a document' node does not correspond to a valid Google Docs file. If the file is not a Google Docs document or if it was created without the correct conversion settings, the update will fail.
fix_steps: Ensure the document you are trying to update is a Google Docs file.
If the document was created in the workflow, check that the 'Convert to Google Drive Document' toggle is enabled.
agent_instruction: Verify that the document is a Google Docs file and adjust the conversion settings if necessary.
